stemHtml:
In a stabilised platform inertial system, the accelerations are measured in an axis co-ordinate system which is…
(NB: aircraft`s body axis co-ordinate system = pitch, roll and yaw axis)

options.a: merged with the aircraft`s body axis co-ordinate system.
options.c: merged with only two axes of the aircraft`s body axis co-ordinate system: the roll and the pitch axis.
options.d: free from the aircraft`s body axis co-ordinate system.
